terms.intro: Welcome to Krushimandi Innovation (“Krushimandi”). By accessing or using the mobile application and related services (“Platform” or “App”), you (“User”, “Farmer”, “Buyer”) agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms & Conditions (“Terms”). Please read carefully before using the Platform.

items.desc: Krushimandi Innovation mobile application and any related web services.
Any person registering or using the Platform, including Farmers and Buyers.
Agricultural produce listed by Farmers on the Platform.
Any negotiation, communication, or agreement initiated through the Platform.

msme.title: 2. MSME Registration & Official Status
points: Krushimandi Innovation is currently registered as an MSME under Indian law.
All Platform operations are compliant with applicable MSME regulations.

roleDisclaimer.title: 3. Platform Role & Disclaimer
points: The Platform is only responsible for matchmaking Farmers with Buyers.
Krushimandi does not purchase, sell, own, or store any Farmer Produce.
All deals, payments, logistics, and quality inspections are solely between the Buyer and the Farmer.
The Platform does not assume responsibility for any misrepresentation, fraud, or disputes arising from user transactions.
Krushimandi may provide guidance, suggestions, or support to Users for connecting and communicating, but does not guarantee completion or success of any transaction.

userResponsibilities.title: 4. User Responsibilities
points: Provide accurate and truthful information during registration and while listing produce or sending requests.
Conduct transactions responsibly, verifying price, quality, and logistics before finalizing deals.
Use the chat feature for legitimate agricultural business purposes only.
Avoid sharing personal sensitive data outside the Platform (mobile numbers, bank info, etc.) unless legally necessary.
Follow all local, state, and central laws, including market regulations, mandi rules, and government norms.

paymentFraud.title: 5. Payment & Fraud Rules
points: Users are solely responsible for payments.
Krushimandi does not hold, process, or mediate payments.
Any fraud, default, or dispute related to payment is the responsibility of the users involved.
Users are advised to verify Buyer/Farmer credentials, negotiate transparently, and maintain proper documentation of deals.
Krushimandi reserves the right to report fraud or criminal activity to authorities if required.
riskPoints: Transactions on the Platform involve real money and financial risk.
Users are expected to act responsibly and at their own risk.
The Platform cannot and does not guarantee protection against financial loss.

ownershipIP.title: 6. Ownership & Intellectual Property
points: Farmers retain full ownership of their produce listed on the Platform.
Krushimandi does not claim any rights or ownership over Farmer Produce.
The Platform itself, its design, logos, and content remain the intellectual property of Krushimandi Innovation.

prohibitedActivities.title: 7. Prohibited Activities
points: Provide false, misleading, or fraudulent information about produce, pricing, or identity.
Circumvent the Platform to directly negotiate outside the system for unfair advantage after connecting.
Send spam, abusive, or offensive messages to other users.
Attempt to hack, disrupt, or misuse the Platform in any manner.

riskAcknowledgment.title: 8. Risk Acknowledgment
points: By using the Platform, users acknowledge transactions carry inherent financial and logistical risks.
The Platform does not guarantee any profit, price, or delivery.
Users use the Platform at their own discretion and risk.

legalCompliance.title: 9. Legal Compliance & Jurisdiction
points: All disputes arising from transactions via the Platform will be subject to Aurangabad District Court, Maharashtra, as the sole jurisdiction.
Users agree to comply with all applicable Indian laws, including but not limited to MSME Act, Agricultural Produce Market Committee (APMC) regulations, and Indian Contract Act provisions.

termination.title: 10. Termination of Access
points: Krushimandi reserves the right to suspend or permanently block users who violate these Terms, engage in fraudulent or illegal activities, or misuse the Platform for purposes outside the scope of matchmaking.

amendments.title: 11. Amendments
points: Krushimandi may update these Terms periodically.
Users will be notified via app notification or email.
Continued use of the Platform after changes implies acceptance of the updated Terms.

limitation.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
points: Krushimandi is not liable for financial losses, disputes, or damages arising from transactions.
Krushimandi does not guarantee delivery, payment, or quality of Farmer Produce.
All services are provided "as is" without warranty.

acknowledgment.title: 13. Acknowledgment
points: By using the Krushimandi Platform, Users explicitly acknowledge and agree that they understand the risks of money and fraud, accept full responsibility for all transactions, and that the Platform is strictly a matchmaking service and does not interfere with ownership or payments.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy – Krushimandi Innovation
privacy.intro: Krushimandi Innovation ("Krushimandi") values your trust and is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have when using the Krushimandi mobile application ("App" or "Platform"). By using Krushimandi, you agree to this Policy.

infoCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
infoCollect.intro: We collect information to connect farmers and buyers effectively and to keep the platform safe. The types of data include:

items.desc: Name, mobile number, password, profile details (Farmer or Buyer).
Crop details, quality, quantity, and availability of produce.
Purchase requirements, negotiation preferences, and deal interests.
Mobile model, operating system, IP address, app version, and crash logs.
Pages you visit, time spent, communication activity, and navigation behavior.

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: Your data is used to improve the platform and match you with the right parties. Specifically:
points: To create and manage user accounts.
To connect farmers with buyers for potential deals.
To personalize recommendations and improve user experience.
To monitor app safety, detect suspicious activities, and prevent fraud.
To analyze trends and improve algorithms for better matchmaking.
To communicate updates, alerts, or policy changes.

ourRole.title: 3. Our Role in Transactions
points: Krushimandi does not buy or sell produce and claims no ownership over goods listed.
The platform only acts as a connector between farmers and buyers.
All negotiations, pricing, payments, and logistics are handled directly between users.
Krushimandi is not liable for fraud, delayed payments, poor quality produce, or disputes.

fraudDisclaimer.title: 4. Fraud and Payment Disclaimer
points: Users are responsible for verifying the authenticity of the parties they deal with.
Do not share unnecessary financial or personal details with unknown users.
Any fraud, misrepresentation, or payment default is strictly between Farmer and Buyer.
Krushimandi may suspend or restrict accounts involved in suspicious or illegal activities.
Serious fraud cases may be reported to law enforcement as required.

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Storage and Security
points: Data is stored using secure, industry-standard practices.
While we take measures to safeguard your data, no online system is 100% secure.
Users must keep login details confidential and use the app responsibly.
If you suspect unauthorized access, report it immediately.

dataRetention.title: 6. Data Retention
points: Your data will be kept as long as your account is active or services are needed.
Some information may be retained for legal or compliance reasons even after account deletion.
Once no longer required, data will be anonymized or securely deleted.

jurisdiction.title: 7. Legal Jurisdiction
points: All disputes or legal cases related to Krushimandi will fall under the Aurangabad District Court, Maharashtra.
By using the app, you agree to submit to this jurisdiction.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
points: We may update this Privacy Policy when laws change or new features are added.
Important updates will be notified via the app or other communication methods.
Continued use of Krushimandi after updates means you accept the new policy.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.text: For any concerns, feedback, or questions about this Privacy Policy, please reach out through the support details provided within the Krushimandi application.
